title: JNV Banaskantha Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Teacher, Expert and More Posts
short_info: The latest Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Banaskantha (JNV Banaskantha) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Teacher, Expert, and Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA) posts! Published on the official website https://www.navodaya.gov.in, this recruitment drive offers 7 openings for eligible candidates.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with PG Diploma in Yoga/M.P.Ed., B.P.Ed. OR M.P.Ed., Female Graduate with 3 years experience in self-defense, Certificate/Diploma in Indian Classical/folk Dance, Certificate/Diploma in relevant field (musical instruments), SSC (Class XII) with computer skills.
qualification.details: Yoga Teacher: Any Graduate with PG Diploma in Yoga/M.P.Ed. with Yoga Specialisation from a recognized university. Sports coach: B.P.Ed. OR M.P.Ed. with specialization in any game from a recognized university. Trainer for Girls for Self Defense: A female Graduate with 3 years of experience in coaching self-defense. Dance Expert: Certificate/Diploma in any of the Indian Classical/folk Dance from a recognized university. Instrument Expert: Certificate/Diploma in a relevant field (any instrument like Flute, Tabla, Sitar, Violin, Guitar, Congo) from a recognized university. Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA): SSC (Class XII) from a recognized Board and possessing a minimum speed of 30 words per minute in English or 25 words per minute in Hindi computer-based typing. OR Passed +2 level of Senior Secondary from CBSE/State Board with secretarial practices and office management as a vocational subject.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Trainer for Girls for Self Defense

salary_details.details: Salary will be AS PER SAMITI NORMS.
